gate: plan 03 Phase 4 gate (d): connected 8-port/order-32 step overhead < 10% (representative grid)
notes: Connected path activates field+network+port_observer CUDA graphs and reports linear state_count=256 (=8*32). The connected network adds a near-constant ~0.20 ms/step absolute cost independent of grid size (8 ports, order-32 model, implicit solve size 8, port observers). The overhead PERCENTAGE therefore only falls below the 10% gate once the bare field step is large enough to amortize it: it crosses 10% near grid 224^3. At the harness's default representative grid (64^3) the overhead is 138%. VERDICT: gate (d) FAILS at the default/representative grid; it passes only for very large (>=~224^3) meshes.
title: Gate (d) 8-port/order-32 connected overhead vs grid size
verdict: FAIL at representative default grid (64^3, 138%); PASS only >=~224^3
